37.reason: [This loop does not correctly detect end-of-line; it reads until EOF, which causes incorrect parsing when second polynomial is on a single line. The first polynomial uses getchar() to detect '\n', but the second doesn't, leading to overreading or infinite loop if input ends without EOF.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 0.25 , reason:  [This loop does not correctly detect end-of-line; it reads until EOF, which causes incorrect parsing when second polynomial is on a single line. The first polynomial uses getchar() to detect '\n', but the second doesn't, leading to overreading or infinite loop if input ends without EOF.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 0.25 , reason:  [This loop does not correctly detect end-of-line; it reads until EOF, which may cause incorrect parsing if input ends with newline instead of EOF. Also, no check for buffer overflow.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 0.25 , reason:  [This loop does not correctly detect end of second line; it reads until EOF instead of stopping at newline, causing incorrect input parsing]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-4: 0.25 , reason:  [This loop does not correctly detect end of second line; it reads until EOF instead of stopping at newline, causing incorrect input parsing.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-5: 0.25 , reason:  [This loop does not correctly detect end of second line; it reads until EOF, but input ends with newline. This causes overreading or infinite loop if input has only two lines.]

46.reason: [Incorrect: should be power_a[i/len_b] + power_b[i%len_b], not factor_a and factor_b. This computes sum of coefficients instead of exponents.]
